scope: public work/blog list and detail query stores

priorities.opportunity: compute resolver-equivalent PublicThumbnailUrl at write/mutation/bootstrap time for supported fallback cases
backendTests: create/update work without explicit thumbnail but with body image stores resolver-equivalent PublicThumbnailUrl
add/delete/reorder video updates PublicThumbnailUrl when no explicit thumbnail asset exists
public list/detail command counts remain optimized
priorities.impact: protects correctness while preserving optimized read path

priorities.opportunity: include DB command p95/sample count in RealLoadTestLatencyBreakdown
backendTests: metrics response exposes DB command p95 when diagnostics collector has samples
priorities.impact: improves attribution of future load-test results

priorities.opportunity: reduce sequential DB roundtrips, starting with site settings plus resume asset projection
backendTests: public home command count drops by at least one command with resume asset present
priorities.impact: reduces DB roundtrips on public home

priorities.opportunity: consider denormalized public video read model if video-heavy targets dominate
backendTests: work detail with videos command count remains within 1-2 or drops to 1 if denormalized

priorities.opportunity: avoid materializing and parsing full content JSON for list/summary DTOs
backendTests: query shape or command-count contract for DTO-visible columns only
priorities.impact: reduces CPU/allocation outside current load-test hot path

alreadyImproved: public work first-page no-search list uses one Postgres command
public blog first-page no-search list uses one Postgres command
public blog detail uses one Postgres command and stored public body fields
public work detail without videos uses one Postgres command and does not reference WorkVideos
admin work list projects DTO-visible fields including PublicThumbnailUrl
